creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 188873
shar for flup6 port

After a little more testing I found flup6 only needs a small update to pass the tests with python 3.4+. This would be a better option than the previous patches.

As the pypi name is different I expect the flup port would be expected to be renamed to match.

I tested using tox with py27, py34, py35, py36, pypy27, pypy33.

Renaming the port would mean also updating the dependant ports (not included).
